judgeScores.justification: The campaign delivers all 6 required files with impressive consistency, maintaining the 'adaptive rhythm' messaging and warm, tech-savvy voice throughout. Strengths include the specific calendar-integration angle that differentiates from generic smart lamps, platform-appropriate social tones (LinkedIn's professionalism vs. Instagram's wellness focus), and a well-structured press release with complete boilerplate. Minor polish issues exist (landing-page.txt repeats 'glare or glare'), and while the execution is solid professional work, it stops short of truly groundbreaking creative territory that would merit a 9-10.
